nasb.text: all the valiant men arose and took away the body of Saul and the bodies of his sons and brought them to Jabesh, and they buried their bones under the oak in Jabesh, and fasted seven days.

esv.text: all the valiant men arose and took away the body of Saul and the bodies of his sons, and brought them to Jabesh. And they buried their bones under the oak in Jabesh and fasted seven days.

cnv.text: 所有的勇士就動身，把掃羅的屍體和他兒子的屍體收殮起來，帶回雅比，把他們的骸骨埋葬在雅比的橡樹下，並且禁食七天。

ccb.text: 他们所有的勇士就去把扫罗和他儿子们的尸体运到雅比，葬在雅比的橡树下，并禁食七天。
